title: Koruun
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Koruun''', also known as '''Korunni''' or '''Korunnal''', was the language of the [[Korun/Legends|Korunnai]] [[Human/Legends|people]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]].

After [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] was taken from his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of Haruun Kal at a very young age, he returned to the planet as a teenager long enough to learn the language and experience the culture. Upon his return to Haruun Kal during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], he was able to understand the language when others spoke it; it was unclear how well he spoke it himself.

==Vocabulary==

*aak - [[Akk dog/Legends|akk dog]]
*Balawai - "downlanders," offworld settlers
*[[dôshalo]] - ghôsh member, clan member
*Korun - a Korun person
*Koruunai - the Korun people
*lammas - [[Lammas/Legends|lammas tree]]
*[[lor pelek]] - leader, spiritual leader, healer, (literally "jungle master")
*[[nidôsh]] - orhpan, clan-child
*[[Pelek Baw/Legends|Pelek Baw]] - the Balawai capital of Haruun Kal
*[[pelekotan]] - the Force

==Grammar==
===Plurals===
To form a plural noun -ai is added to the end of a noun. In some cases, the final syllable is also modified. For example, Korun becomes Koruunai, and dôshalo becomes dôshallai, but Balaw is simply Balawai

==Body Language==
The Koruunai's equivalent of a shrug was to tilt the head slightly to the right.

==Names==
===Given Names===

*[[Besh (Korun)|Besh]]
*Chalk
*[[Iolu]]

*Lesh
*[[Mace Windu|Mace]]

*[[Kar Vastor|Vaster]]
*[[Mace Windu|Windu]]
